summary: Complete frontend testing of Frameflow platform. All major modules verified: Landing Website with hero, features, testimonials, FAQ, CTA sections and WhatsApp links; Demo login flow; Dashboard with quick actions, stats, campaigns, scheduled posts; Content Scheduler with calendar and post creation; Analytics Dashboard with stats, charts, performance data; Integrations page with Instagram/Meta OAuth UI; Templates page with café marketing templates; Media Library page; Admin Dashboard with user management. Fixed JWT error in auth.py (jwt.JWTError -> jwt.PyJWTError).

minor.issue: Returns 404 for demo user in console due to expected lack of data - not blocking

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed JWT error: Changed jwt.JWTError to jwt.PyJWTError in /app/backend/auth.py line 41
All navigation items work without white screens
WhatsApp CTAs correctly configured with phone +919930408074
Demo login flow works correctly through /api/demo/login endpoint
Admin dashboard properly shows user management with role-based access
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.backend: 100% - JWT fix applied, all endpoints accessible

seed_data_creation: Demo session used through Try Demo button on landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend modules are working. Fixed JWT authentication error. Tested with demo mode and admin login. WhatsApp integration uses external links with +919930408074. Analytics shows demo data. Instagram/Meta OAuth connections show UI but require actual OAuth setup by user.
